micro_rules: Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.
Remove unrelated helper actions and duplicate service calls.

rows.command_eng: When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.
rows.output: {"name":"When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#PresenceSensor).presencesensor_presence == true) { (#Television).television_channel = 0; }"}

rows.command_eng: When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.
rows.output: {"name":"When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#SoundSensor).soundsensor_sound > 50) { (#Speaker).speaker_stop() }"}

rows.command_eng: When it rains, turn on the dehumidifier.
